title: Image processing method and apparatus, and electronic device
abstract: An image processing method and apparatus, and an electronic device, the method includes: acquiring a first face coordinate of a first image (302); acquiring a second face coordinate of a second image, in which, the first image has a different resolution from the second image, and an image size of the first image is greater than an image size of the second image (304); calculating a magnification ratio according to the image size of the first image and the image size of the second image, and calculating a second target face coordinate according to the magnification ratio and the second face coordinate (306); comparing the first face coordinate with the second target face coordinate to obtain a comparing result (308); and performing face clustering according to the comparing result (310).
claims: Claims ( 16 ) AnĂ‚Â imageĂ‚Â processingĂ‚Â method,Ă‚Â comprising: acquiringĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â coordinateĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â image,Ă‚Â whereinĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â coordinateĂ‚Â isĂ‚Â configuredĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â representĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â positionĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â imageĂ‚Â inĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â imageĂ‚Â (302)Ă‚Â ; acquiringĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â coordinateĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â image,Ă‚Â whereinĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â coordinateĂ‚Â isĂ‚Â configuredĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â representĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â positionĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â imageĂ‚Â inĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â image,Ă‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â imageĂ‚Â hasĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â differentresolutionĂ‚Â fromĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â image,Ă‚Â andĂ‚Â anĂ‚Â imageĂ‚Â sizeĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â imageĂ‚Â isĂ‚Â greaterĂ‚Â thanĂ‚Â anĂ‚Â imageĂ‚Â sizeĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â imageĂ‚Â (304)Ă‚Â ; calculatingĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â magnificationĂ‚Â ratioĂ‚Â accordingĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â imageĂ‚Â sizeĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â imageĂ‚Â andĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â imageĂ‚Â sizeĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â image,Ă‚Â andĂ‚Â calculatingĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â targetĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â coordinateĂ‚Â accordingĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â magnificationĂ‚Â ratioĂ‚Â andĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â coordinateĂ‚Â (306)Ă‚Â ; comparingĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â coordinateĂ‚Â withĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â targetĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â coordinateĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â obtainĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â comparingĂ‚Â resultĂ‚Â (308)Ă‚Â ;Ă‚Â and performingĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â clusteringĂ‚Â accordingĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â comparingĂ‚Â resultĂ‚Â (310)Ă‚Â . TheĂ‚Â methodaccordingĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â claimĂ‚Â 1,Ă‚Â whereinĂ‚Â acquiringĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â coordinateĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â imageĂ‚Â (302)Ă‚Â comprises: performingĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â recognitionĂ‚Â onĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â imageĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â obtainĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â imageĂ‚Â andĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â correspondingĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â coordinate; whereinĂ‚Â acquiringĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â coordinateĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â imageĂ‚Â (304)Ă‚Â comprises: performingĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â recognitionĂ‚Â onĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â imageĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â obtainĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â imageĂ‚Â andĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â correspondingĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â coordinate,Ă‚Â whereinĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â imageĂ‚Â isĂ‚Â obtainedĂ‚Â fromĂ‚Â compressingĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â image. TheĂ‚Â methodĂ‚Â accordingĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â claimĂ‚Â 1Ă‚Â orĂ‚Â 2,Ă‚Â whereinĂ‚Â calculatingĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â magnificationĂ‚Â ratioĂ‚Â accordingĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â sizeĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â imageĂ‚Â andĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â sizeĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â imageĂ‚Â (306)Ă‚Â comprises: calculatingĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â ratioĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â widthĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â imageĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â widthĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â imageĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â obtainĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â magnificationĂ‚Â ratio; calculatingĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â ratioĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â heightĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â imageĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â heightĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â imageĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â obtainĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â magnificationĂ‚Â ratio;Ă‚Â and selectingĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â magnificationĂ‚Â ratioĂ‚Â orĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â magnificationĂ‚Â ratioĂ‚Â asĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â magnificationĂ‚Â ratio. TheĂ‚Â methodĂ‚Â accordingĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â anyĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â claimsĂ‚Â 1-3,Ă‚Â whereinĂ‚Â comparingĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â coordinateĂ‚Â withĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â targetĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â coordinateĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â obtainĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â comparingĂ‚Â resultĂ‚Â (308)Ă‚Â comprises: determiningĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â positionĂ‚Â relationshipĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â imageĂ‚Â andĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â targetĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â imageĂ‚Â accordingĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â  faceĂ‚Â coordinateĂ‚Â andĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â targetĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â coordinate,Ă‚Â whereinĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â targetĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â imageĂ‚Â isĂ‚Â obtainedĂ‚Â byĂ‚Â magnifyingĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â imageĂ‚Â withĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â magnificationĂ‚Â ratio;Ă‚Â and determiningĂ‚Â whetherĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â imageĂ‚Â andĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â imageĂ‚Â correspondĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â sameĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â accordingĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â positionĂ‚Â relationship. TheĂ‚Â methodĂ‚Â accordingĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â claimĂ‚Â 4,Ă‚Â whereinĂ‚Â determiningĂ‚Â whetherĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â imageĂ‚Â andĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â imageĂ‚Â correspondĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â sameĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â accordingĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â positionĂ‚Â relationshipĂ‚Â comprises: whenĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â imageĂ‚Â andĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â targetĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â imageĂ‚Â haveĂ‚Â anĂ‚Â overlappingĂ‚Â relationship,Ă‚Â determiningĂ‚Â thatĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â imageĂ‚Â andĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â imageĂ‚Â correspondĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â sameĂ‚Â face;Ă‚Â or whenĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â imageĂ‚Â andĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â targetĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â imageĂ‚Â haveĂ‚Â anĂ‚Â inclusionĂ‚Â relationship,Ă‚Â calculatingĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â sizeĂ‚Â ratioĂ‚Â accordingĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â sizeĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â imageĂ‚Â andĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â sizeĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â targetĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â image,Ă‚Â andĂ‚Â determiningĂ‚Â whetherĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â imageĂ‚Â andĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â imageĂ‚Â correspondĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â sameĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â accordingĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â sizeĂ‚Â ratio;Ă‚Â or whenĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â imageĂ‚Â andĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â targetĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â imageĂ‚Â haveĂ‚Â anĂ‚Â intersectionĂ‚Â relationship,Ă‚Â calculatingĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â areaĂ‚Â ratioĂ‚Â accordingĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â areaĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â imageĂ‚Â andĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â areaĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â targetĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â image,Ă‚Â andĂ‚Â determiningĂ‚Â whetherĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â imageĂ‚Â andĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â imageĂ‚Â correspondĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â sameĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â accordingĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â areaĂ‚Â ratio;Ă‚Â or whenĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â imageĂ‚Â andĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â targetĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â imageĂ‚Â haveĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â separationĂ‚Â relationship,Ă‚Â determiningĂ‚Â thatĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â imageĂ‚Â andĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â imageĂ‚Â correspondĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â differentĂ‚Â faces. TheĂ‚Â methodaccordingĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â claimĂ‚Â 5,Ă‚Â whereinĂ‚Â calculatingĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â sizeĂ‚Â ratioĂ‚Â accordingĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â sizeĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â imageĂ‚Â andĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â sizeĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â targetĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â imageĂ‚Â comprises: calculatingaĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â sizeĂ‚Â ratioĂ‚Â accordingĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â widthĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â imageĂ‚Â andĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â widthĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â targetĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â image; calculatingĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â sizeĂ‚Â ratioĂ‚Â accordingĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â heightĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â imageĂ‚Â andĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â heightĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â targetĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â image;Ă‚Â and selectingĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â sizeĂ‚Â ratioĂ‚Â orĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â sizeĂ‚Â ratioĂ‚Â asĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â sizeĂ‚Â ratio, whereinĂ‚Â calculatingĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â areaĂ‚Â ratioĂ‚Â accordingĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â areaĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â imageĂ‚Â andĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â areaĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â targetĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â imageĂ‚Â comprises: acquiringĂ‚Â anĂ‚Â areaĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â anĂ‚Â intersectionĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â imageĂ‚Â andĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â targetĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â imageĂ‚Â asĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â area; acquiringĂ‚Â anĂ‚Â areaĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â unionĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â imageĂ‚Â andĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â targetĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â imageĂ‚Â asĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â area;Ă‚Â and calculatingĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â areaĂ‚Â ratioĂ‚Â accordingĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â areaĂ‚Â andĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â area.
